message:
fix(tmux): correct pane name regex to properly capture bracket tags

Fix the paneNameRegex pattern to correctly parse and capture tags
enclosed in square brackets in pane titles.

Before: ^.+__(\w+)_\d+(?:_([A-Za-z0-9._/@:+-]+))?(?:[^\]]*)?$
After:  ^.+__(\w+)_\d+(?:_([A-Za-z0-9._/@:+-]+))?(?:\[([^\]]*)\])?$

The previous pattern had two issues:
1. (?:[^\]]*) was a non-capturing group that didn't actually match
   the bracket structure - it matched any non-] characters
2. The pattern couldn't capture tag content because the group was
   non-capturing and didn't require the opening bracket

The fixed pattern:
- (?:\[([^\]]*)\])? explicitly matches [content] structure
- Inner capturing group ([^\]]*) captures the tag content
- Outer non-capturing group makes the entire bracket section optional

This enables proper parsing of pane titles like:
- session__cc_1[frontend]        → tags: ["frontend"]
- session__cc_1[frontend,api]    → tags: ["frontend", "api"]
- session__cc_1_opus[backend]    → variant: "opus", tags: ["backend"]

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
